hero_subtitle: Personalized programs, real-time session tracking, nutrition and recovery — all powered by AI.
hero_free_mention: Free for up to 5 athletes. No credit card required.
why_card_1_desc: Sessions with sections, detailed exercises, built-in timer — everything you need.
why_card_2_desc: Program generation, exercise alternatives, macro estimation, meal suggestions.
why_card_3_desc: Dashboards, strength progression, check-ins, exportable PDF reports.
feat_1_subtitle: Create custom programs or let AI do it for you.
feat_1_bullet_1: Sessions structured in sections (warm-up, blocks, cool-down)
feat_2_subtitle: Your athlete follows their session from their phone at the gym.
feat_2_bullet_1: Log weight and reps set by set
feat_3_subtitle: Gym sessions + group classes in a single calendar.
feat_3_bullet_1: Log your Episod, CMG, running sessions...
feat_4_subtitle: Not another MyFitnessPal. Visibility for the coach.
feat_5_subtitle: Machine busy? No problem. The app adapts.
feat_5_bullet_1: Exercise alternatives defined by the coach
feat_5_bullet_3: Move a session to another day
feat_6_subtitle: Visualize results. For coach and athlete.
pricing_all_include: All plans include: calendar, weekly check-in, external sessions, dark mode, bilingual FR/EN
faq_q1: How long does it take to create a program?
faq_a1: Manually, about 15-20 min for a complete program. With AI, it's done in 30 seconds — then you adjust.
faq_q2: Do my athletes need to pay?
faq_a2: No. Athletes inherit their coach's plan. No separate subscription.
faq_q3: Can I import clients from another app?
faq_a3: Coming soon! Import from other platforms is arriving in the coming weeks.
faq_a4: Each week, you report your energy, sleep, stress and soreness. Your coach uses this data to adjust your program.
faq_a5: You can move sessions and replace exercises on the fly. Your coach sees the changes.
faq_a6: Not yet — it's planned for a future update.
cta_subtitle: Join F6GYM for free. Up to 5 athletes, no credit card required.
legal_mentions_content: F6GYM is a product of From6 Agency.
